texto: My dad says that when I was two or three I used to go out dressed as a different character every day. I remember thinking it was perfectly normal to wear different coloured shoes and carry a pink umbrella. But now I've got a goddaughter of that age I realise it's not normal at all.
explicacao: Citação de Alice Eve sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “My dad says that when I was two or three I used to go out dressed as a different character every …” articula reflexao, day, character em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como character e shoes.
